In the meantime, you can find out more about life within the NHS Test and Trace Diagnostic Labs by downloading our Candidate Brochure.

rightValue.stringValue: NHS Test and Trace - Uni Placement
NHS Test and Trace - Speculative Interest
Manton Wood Industrial Estate, Worksop, S80 2RS
Mill Hill Distribution Park, Peterlee, SR8 2HR

textTemplates.name: Candidate_Email_Wording
textTemplates.text:
Dear {!$Record.First_Name__c},

Thank you for your application and expressing an interest in joining the NHS Test and Trace Laboratories team.

Your application is currently being reviewed by our recruitment partners at {!$Record.Brand__c}.

If you’re a suitable match for the role, they’ll be in touch very soon to confirm the next step in your application journey.

{!Candidate_Brouchure}{!JLTBrochure}{!SLTBrochure}

Kind Regards

NHS Test and Trace

textTemplates.name: Candidate_Wording_Generic
textTemplates.text:
Dear {!$Record.First_Name__c},

Thank you for your application and expressing an interest in joining the NHS Test and Trace Laboratories team.

Your application is currently being reviewed by our recruitment partners at SRG, Medacs Healthcare and Blue Arrow.

If you’re a suitable match for the role, they’ll be in touch very soon to confirm the next step in your application journey.

{!Candidate_Brouchure}

Kind Regards

NHS Test and Trace

textTemplates.name: Email_Body
textTemplates.text:
Hi,

A new response has come in for a NHS Test and Trace Application, to access the response please login to Jobscience or click the link below:

https://impellam.lightning.force.com/lightning/r/Response__c/{!$Record.Id}/view

Thanks,

Jobscience Team.
